title: Add gate pass-all with fail-fast
description:
Add `gate pass-all` to run all of an issue's required gates in one command, fail-fast.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] `jit gate pass-all <id>` runs each required gate in turn, stops at the first non-pass, and exits non-zero per the exit-code taxonomy.
- [ ] It inherits the skip-if-passed-at-HEAD behavior (already-passed gates are not re-run).
